items.title:
啊？没人能想到 Midjourney 发布的硬件是这个东西。

他们成立了一个新的部门叫 Midjourney 医疗，发布的第一款硬件设备是一款人体扫描设备。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench, a benchmark for measuring and improving how well AI supports real-world li...
items.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, a benchmark for measuring and improving how well AI supports real-world life science research. Developed with 173 scientists from biotechnology and pharmaceutical research, LifeSciBench includes 750 expert-authored tasks across seven biological research…

items.title: Benchmarks often test biological knowledge or narrow skills. The tasks in LifeSciBench test whether ...
items.summary: Benchmarks often test biological knowledge or narrow skills. The tasks in LifeSciBench test whether models can reason from evidence, work with scientific artifacts, handle uncertainty, and make useful decisions under real-world constraints. GPT‑Rosalind scores above GPT‑5.5 acros…

items.title: LifeSciBench is a foundation for more realistic evaluation, targeted improvements, and continued par...
items.summary: LifeSciBench is a foundation for more realistic evaluation, targeted improvements, and continued partnership with the life sciences community—helping the field measure progress, identify gaps, and improve AI together for the benefit of everyone.💬9🔄7❤️172👀53652📊21⚡ Powered by xgo.…

items.title: The full process took about 2.5 months, plus another half month for human chemists to write up the r...
items.summary: The full process took about 2.5 months, plus another half month for human chemists to write up the results. This is an early example of frontier models supporting more of the scientific research loop: reviewing studies, proposing hypotheses, designing experiments, interpreting da…

items.title: Maria tested the idea across 10,080 reactions, and human chemists later validated representative res...
items.summary: Maria tested the idea across 10,080 reactions, and human chemists later validated representative results by hand. Under the optimized conditions, yields improved for 88% of the boronic acids and 83% of the sulfonamides tested. Human chemists then repeated 14 representative reacti…

items.title: GPT-5.4 helped drive a medicinal chemistry project from literature review to a validated experimenta...
items.summary: GPT-5.4 helped drive a medicinal chemistry project from literature review to a validated experimental result. Paired with Molecule.one’s Maria AI and specialized lab, the model proposed an unexpected way to improve a widely used reaction in drug discovery.Your browser does not su…
